scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run api" "npm run serve"
scripts.serve: cd frontend && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=256'  npm run start
scripts.build: cd frontend && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' npm run build
scripts.dev: echo 'NOTE: dev mode uses hot-reload and consumes more RAM. Use npm start for production mode.' && concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: cd frontend && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=512' npm run dev
